name: "✨ Extension Request"
about: Suggest a new data source to add as an extension
labels: extension
---

## Data source

**Name / URL:**

**What it provides:**

- [ ] Papers
- [ ] News
- [ ] Repos
- [ ] Jobs
- [ ] Alerts / monitoring
- [ ] Other

## Why it would be useful

<!-- Who would benefit? What workflow or research area does it support? -->

## Data access

- [ ] Public API (no key needed)
- [ ] API with free tier
- [ ] Requires paid API key
- [ ] RSS / Atom feed
- [ ] Web scraping

**Relevant docs / example URL:**

## Config shape you expect

<!-- Optional: what would the config block probably look like? -->

```yaml
my_source:
  enabled: true
```

## Are you willing to help implement it?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] I can provide sample data or docs
- [ ] No
